name: Cinco De Mayo Bread for Bread Machine
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the water to the bread machine pan.
2. Add the white bread flour, sugar, salt, and olive oil to the pan with the water.
3. Add the corn meal, creamed corn, green chiles, jalepenos, and cilantro to the pan.
4. Select the regular loaf setting for 8 servings or the large loaf setting for 12 servings.
5. Press start and allow the machine to complete the cycle.
6. When the machine has finished mixing, transfer the dough to a lightly oiled baking sheet or bowl lined with parchment paper.
7. Let the dough rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
8. Punch down the dough and shape it into a loaf.
9. Place the shaped dough on a greased baking sheet and let it rise again for another 30 minutes.
10. Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C) if baking by hand.
11. Bake the bread in the preheated oven for 25-30 minutes, or until golden brown and the internal temperature reaches 190°F (88°C).
12. Remove from the oven and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
Note: For best results, use fast-rise yeast if available.
